mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department ( parent_id, name, leader_employee_id, sort_order, status ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{name}, #{leaderEmployeeId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, leader_employee_id, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM department WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, parent_id, name, leader_employee_id, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM department ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, leader_employee_id = #{leaderEmployeeId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
